meta.description: Machine-readable green-light / red-light material reference for Question 3 producibility check. Any single red-light material = instant kill.
meta.rule: If any material in the product is in the red_light list — stop. Do not advance.

green_light.description: Egyptian workshops can source and produce with these materials. A product made only from these passes the materials check.

local_sources: Timber yards in every Cairo neighborhood
Wholesale in Imbaba, Shubra El Kheima
materials.workshop_capability: Laser cutting, CNC routing, hand cutting, assembly

local_sources: Acrylic shops in Nasr City, Heliopolis, Shubra
materials.workshop_capability: Laser cutting, CNC routing, heat bending

local_sources: Shubra El Kheima industrial zone — Egypt produces aluminum domestically
Textile markets in Moski, Ataba, Wekalet El Balah
Hardware stores everywhere / Ataba / El Moski for decorative hardware
Screen printing shops in all Cairo neighborhoods
Craft supply shops, construction supply markets
Hardware stores / El Sawy paint area / Ataba / Moski
materials.workshop_capability: Founder applies at home — no workshop machinery needed

red_light.description: Any single item from this list in any product = instant kill. No exceptions. No rationalizations.

materials.reason: Electronics require specialized production, quality control, and sourcing Egypt cannot match at this price tier. Also: the product must self-sell on a shelf — electronics add explanation requirement.
Injection molding requires factory-level tooling investment. Egyptian workshops do not have this capability.
Requires factory calibration. Workshop cannot produce at required tolerance.
Mold production requires specialized tooling. Imported molds = imported core component.
Egyptian food-grade certification adds regulatory complexity incompatible with speed-to-market model.

variants: any part that must be shipped from outside Egypt
materials.reason: Import dependency reintroduces the vulnerability that killed the 2018 model. Zero exceptions.
Founder finish must be achievable on a home balcony with water-based products only.

semi_diy_finish_materials.description: Materials the founder applies at home as the finish layer. All must be locally available in Egypt.
approved: Water-based wood stain — local paint shops
Felt sheets / fabric scraps — Moski / Ataba
Hot glue gun + sticks — hardware / stationery
Decorative hardware (knobs, small hinges, handles) — Ataba / El Moski
kill_conditions: Requires spray booth or spray gun
Finish time exceeds 30 minutes per unit
Requires specialized equipment not available at hardware stores
